name: 104" x 60" Cotton Tablecloth Dark Red - Threshold™: Traditional Rectangle, Autumn Decor, OEKO-TEX Certified
description:
Add a pop of color to your everyday dining space with this Cotton Tablecloth from Threshold™. This rectangular tablecloth features a subtle textured pattern in a red hue, making it easy to coordinate with a variety of decor styles and color schemes for versatile styling. The cotton-blend material helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes, and it's machine washable for easy care. Simply add coordinating napkins, table runners and placemats to create an understated yet sophisticated look that's perfect for any setting.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
